top_signals.title: Shipping stalls in Strait of Hormuz after Iran declares key waterway closed again
top_signals.summary: The update comes even as industry trackers showed Iranian tankers have continued to sail through the strait.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gilts Steady, Pound Lower as UK Prime Minister Starmer Resigns
top_signals.summary: Gilts traded steady and the pound held losses after UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced he will step down.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: New data release: ECB wage tracker points to stable negotiated wage pressures in 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Money in transition
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Money Laundering Advisory Notice: High Risk Third Countries
top_signals.summary: This document contains advice issued by HM Treasury about risks posed by jurisdictions with unsatisfactory money laundering and terrorist financing controls.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Waymo recalls about 3,900 robotaxis after some drove into 'freeway construction zones'
top_signals.summary: After some Waymo robotaxis drove into closed construction zones, the company implemented a recall to fix underlying software issues.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EasyJet Rebuffs Offer, Saying It Wont Be Bought ‘On the Cheap’
top_signals.summary: EasyJet Plc has rebuffed three separate offers from Castlelake LP, prompting the investment firm to take its latest proposal that values the budget carrier at about £4.74 billion ($6.3 billion) directly to shareholders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Lithium Plunges in China on Speculation Over Status of CATL Mine
top_signals.summary: Chinese lithium futures have shed about 9% in two days on unconfirmed speculation one of the world’s biggest mines for the battery metal may restart soon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why sinodollars outweigh the petroyuan
top_signals.summary: China’s currency is becoming a more important part of the global financial system but the dollar is still in control
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan's JERA to build large gas-fired plant for US data center for $3bn
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services, April 2026
top_signals.summary: The U.S. monthly international trade deficit decreased in April 2026 according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis and the U.S. Census Bureau. The deficit decreased from $56.6 billion in March (revised) to $55.9 billion in April, as exports increased more than imports. The goods deficit decreased $2.4 billion in April to $83.7 billion. The services surplus decreased $1.7 billion in April to $27.8 billion. Full Text
